n0.hypothesis: Improve profile routing, length compliance, non-repetition, and empirical-fact checking without material fidelity regression
n0.insight:
[from n1] Executable render precedence should be explicit and compact; length minima should not override a user request.
[from n2] Development metrics must classify claim context, not count raw numerals or topic words.

n1.hypothesis: A ceiling-first final render gate plus single-home issue routing will make the Skill obey explicit length and non-repetition constraints without weakening fidelity safeguards.
n1.insight: Ceiling-first precedence, a final render check, and single-home issue routing are sufficient static instructions; metric failures are orthogonal.

metadata.result: Routing-only Skill changes raised the frozen suite from 1/12 to 4/12; all three routing tests passed and detector tests remained intentionally absent.

n2.hypothesis: A context-aware deterministic metric will distinguish unsupported empirical claims from structural numerals and repeated limitations from necessary topic mentions.
n2.insight: Context-aware quantity classification and visible-unit limitation matching remove structural-number and topic-frequency false positives.

metadata.result: The isolated v2 evaluator passed all nine metric-related tests; only the three untouched routing-text tests failed.
